hallucination.rationale: The generated note contains only a massive thinking/reasoning process and no actual clinical note output. There is no final note to evaluate, but the thinking process itself does not constitute a clinical note.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking/reasoning process with no actual clinical note produced. The instruction was to return ONLY the completed note, and instead the output is an extensive internal deliberation with no final product.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was generated. All transcript content is missing from any structured output.
missed_items: Plan including medication, education, and follow-up

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is entirely unstructured thinking/reasoning text.

entity_marking.rationale: No clinical note was generated, so no entity marking was performed in any output.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains extreme repetitive duplication, with the same checks and reasoning blocks repeated dozens of times verbatim.
